query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS establishment_categories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  establishmentId INT NOT NULL,
  categoryId INT NOT NULL,
  isPrimary TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_estab_cat (establishmentId, categoryId)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS establishment_categories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  establishmentId INT NOT NULL,
  categoryId INT NOT NULL,
  isPrimary TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_estab_cat (establishmentId, categoryId)
);
